title: getViews
text: getViews Returns an array of uniface.View objects representing the views of a component instance. Return = Instance . getViews() Arguments None Return Value Return An array of uniface.View objects that represent the views of the specified component instance. Related Links uniface.Instance The uniface.Instance object provides access to selected properties and methods of the component instance that it represents. uniface.View The uniface.View object represents a view of a component that has been created by calling instance.createView(). Multiple Views for Dynamic Server Pages A View is an HTML layout that is displayed inside an unbound HTML element in the layout of the web page. Each instance of a dynamic server page (DSP) can have multiple views that provide different layouts for its data. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
